calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Off Calendar

Notice And Demurrer To West Bay'S Complaint; Or In The Alternative, Request For Stay; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO WEST BAY'S COMPLAINT; OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, REQUEST FOR STAY.

APPEARANCES: Brian M. Junginger, Esq. of McInerney & Dillon 510/465-7100 for pltf & opposing party; Louise S. Simpson, Deputy City Atty 554-3929 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DEMURRER OVERRULED, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. THE COURT DENIES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF 4/23/08 LETTER. SEE: CRUZ V. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES (1985) 173 CAL.APP.3D 1131. The Court struck the following portion of the tentative ruling: "Request for stay denied" as being moot. (Counsel indicated that the issue of the stay would be brought before Judge Quidachay since consolidated stop notice cases are pending before him.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice And Demurrer To West Bay'S Complaint; Or In The Alternative, Request For Stay; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Continued To Dec-03-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO WEST BAY'S COMPLAINT; OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, REQUEST FOR STAY. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to December 3, 2010 on the court's own motion. Opposing party to provide courtesy copies of its papers to department 302. Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Reporter: Candace Yount, CSR #2737
